testcase.name: auth > isAuthorised > returns false when API_KEY is missing
auth > isAuthorised > returns false when the header is missing
auth > isAuthorised > returns false when header is not Bearer format
auth > isAuthorised > returns false when token is wrong
auth > isAuthorised > returns true when token is correct
auth > validateAuth > returns true for a valid token
auth > validateAuth > returns false for an invalid token
auth > enforceAuth > Sends 401 when request is not authorised
auth > enforceAuth > does not send 401 when request is authorized
cache > addToBuffer stores one snapshot and updates latestSnapshot
cache > getBufferSince returns only entries from the requested time
cache > trims entries older than 24 hours
cache > warmCache loads, sorts, filters nulls, and merges snapshots by timestamp
testcase.system-out: Warm cache loaded 1 entries for NEM. Warm cache loaded 2 entries for WEM.

testcase.name: index file tests > starts app and wires dependencies when env is valid
index file tests > exits when required env is missing
normalise > round, > rounds numbers to requested decimals
normalise > round, > returns null for null/undefined
normalise > buildSnapFromRows > builds network + region snapshots with correct aggregates
normalise > buildSnapFromRows > supports network region when the field is not there
normalise > buildSnapFromRows > uses datatable rows directly and falls back to DataTable parsing
normalise > buildSnapFromRows > returns empty latest intervals and uses latest source rows in buildSnapshot
normalise > buildSnapFromRows > handles unknown fueltech, zero generation, and missing market data
normalise > buildSnapFromRows > falls back to market or current time when generation timestamps are unavailable
poller > poll success: fetches, builds, caches, writes S3, emits event, updates lastPollAt
poller > poll failure: logs error and skips cache/S3/update
poller > startPoller uses configured POLL_INTERVAL_MS
testcase.system-err: Poll failed. TypeError: client.getNetworkData is not a function at poll [90m(C:\Users\swaga\Documents\GitHub\ElectricityGrid-api\[39msrc\poller.ts:34:14[90m)[39m at Module.startPoller [90m(C:\Users\swaga\Documents\GitHub\ElectricityGrid-api\[39msrc\poller.ts:110:8[90m)[39m at [90mC:\Users\swaga\Documents\GitHub\ElectricityGrid-api\[39msrc\tests\poller.test.ts:161:30 [90m at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)[39m at [90mfile:///C:/Users/swaga/Documents/GitHub/ElectricityGrid-api/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/chunk-hooks.js:752:20

testcase.name: poller > startPoller uses default interval (5 minutes) when env is missing
testcase.system-err: Poll failed. TypeError: client.getNetworkData is not a function at poll [90m(C:\Users\swaga\Documents\GitHub\ElectricityGrid-api\[39msrc\poller.ts:34:14[90m)[39m at Module.startPoller [90m(C:\Users\swaga\Documents\GitHub\ElectricityGrid-api\[39msrc\poller.ts:110:8[90m)[39m at [90mC:\Users\swaga\Documents\GitHub\ElectricityGrid-api\[39msrc\tests\poller.test.ts:178:16 [90m at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)[39m at [90mfile:///C:/Users/swaga/Documents/GitHub/ElectricityGrid-api/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest/runner[24m/dist/chunk-hooks.js:752:20

testcase.name: rest routes > GET /v1/health works without auth and returns health payload
rest routes > auth hook runs for protected routes
rest routes > GET /v1/live returns 503 when cache is empty
rest routes > GET /v1/live validates network query and returns 400/404/success
rest routes > GET /v1/live (no network) returns all snapshots
rest routes > GET /v1/live/region/:region handles invalid/empty/missing/success
rest routes > GET /v1/live/price handles empty and success
rest routes > GET /v1/stats validates query and returns stats
rest routes > GET /v1/history validates query and returns series
s3-query > readFromBuffer returns sorted + deduped points
s3-query > readFromBuffer handles region + price metric
s3-query > readFromBuffer skips entries when network snapshot is missing
s3-query > readFromBuffer returns null for network price when no region price exists
s3-query > readFromBuffer covers region fueltech, average price, and summary fallback metrics
s3-query > readFromBuffer returns null for unsupported fueltech metrics
s3-query > readFromBuffer handles snapshot fueltech price, curtailment lookups, and invalid metrics
s3-query > readFromBuffer covers remaining region metric branches
s3-query > readFromBuffer falls back to region loads and curtailment for fueltech metrics
s3-query > queryHistory routes to buffer for 24h/5m
s3-query > queryHistory routes to hourly rollups for 7d
s3-query > queryHistory routes to daily rollups for 30d/90d
s3-query > readHourlyRollups filters rows and maps metric
s3-query > readHourlyRollups filters by fueltech and maps generation fallback
s3-query > readHourlyRollups filters out fueltech summary rows and maps demand/renewables/emissions metrics
s3-query > readHourlyRollups returns null values for unsupported metrics
s3-query > readDailyRollups returns mapped daily points
s3-query > computeStats returns min/max and ignores fueltech rows
s3-query > computeStats returns null stats when no matching rows
s3-query > getBufferSize returns recentBuffer length
s3 > builds live keys
s3 > builds raw and rollup keys
s3 > builds raw keys for a time range in 5-minute steps
s3 > builds hourly rollup keys for a range
s3 > builds daily rollup keys counting back from today
s3 input output helpers > putJson writes json with cache-control
s3 input output helpers > putJson uses no-cache when maxAge is 0
s3 input output helpers > putNdjson writes newline-delimited json
s3 input output helpers > getJson parses object body
s3 input output helpers > getJson returns null for missing object
s3 input output helpers > getNdjson returns [] for missing object
s3 input output helpers > getNdjson parses rows and ignores blank lines
s3 input output helpers > getNdjson returns [] for missing object
s3 input output helpers > getJsonMany and getNdjsonMany aggregate results
s3 input output helpers > throws when bucket is missing
sse routes > registers /v1/events and rejects unauthorized requests
sse routes > streams connected, update, and heartbeat events and cleans up on close
system tests > serves health publicly and protects live endpoints with bearer auth
system tests > returns live snapshots and region pricing from the real route stack
system tests > serves 24h history from the in-memory buffer using the real query code
system tests > serves historical rollups and computed stats through the real HTTP endpoints
system tests > rejects invalid history queries
system tests > uses default history query params when only metric is provided
system tests > serves region fueltech history from loads and curtailment fallback rows
system tests > rejects unauthorized SSE connections before opening a stream
ws route testing > registers /v1/ws and blocks unauthorized in preValidation
ws route testing > sends initial snapshot and handles invalid message
ws route testing > subscribes/unsubscribes and cleans up on close/error
applySubscriptions > returns snapshots unchanged with empty subscriptions
applySubscriptions > filters by regions and recomputes aggregates
applySubscriptions > filters snapshots down to price-only metric subscriptions
applySubscriptions > preserves emissions when only emissions metrics are subscribed
applySubscriptions > retains generation, renewables, demand, and emission intensity metrics when subscribed
applySubscriptions > handles zero-generation selected regions when recomputing proportions
applySubscriptions > merges duplicate load and curtailment fueltechs and preserves undefined regions
